caption: A man wearing a green baseball cap, headphones, and a dark green t-shirt with the text "ION NEVER DO SHIT" is speaking into a professional microphone in a room that appears to be a clothing studio or boutique. Behind him, the wall is decorated with several framed photographs, and a white male mannequin wearing a white garment stands to his left. Racks of clothing and a black chair are also visible in the background. Two logos appear on the screen: a circular logo on the left and a red logo on the right that reads "REALLY REALLY TOT". Throughout the sequence, the man maintains his position while speaking; as the clip progresses, he begins to gesture with his right hand, lifting it up and pointing his index finger to emphasize a point while continuing to talk.
